mnemonics: Most Important Sequential Logic Things I Need To Remember
Latches Are Slow But Flip Flops Are Fast
keyPoints: Sequential Logic deals with digital circuits that change over time
Sequential Circuits use Latches or Flip Flops as Storage Elements
Latches are Unidirectional and store only the current state
Flip Flops are Bidirectional and store both the current and previous state
J-K Flip Flops have two inputs: J and K, while T Flip Flops have one input: T
Master-Slave Flip Flops consist of a Master Flip Flop and two Slaves
D Flip Flops have one input: D, while T Flip Flops have one input: T
